title: iPhone Marketplace Advance Payment Scam
description: I found an advertisement for a second-hand iPhone on an online marketplace. The seller from Used Deal Shop asked me to transfer ₹18,000 as an advance to UPI ID rajeshstore@okaxis. The seller communicated through phone number +91 9988776655 and email support@useddealshop.com. After the payment, the advertisement disappeared and the seller stopped responding.

title: Fake MacBook Seller Fraud
description: A person claiming to represent Used Deal Shop offered a MacBook at a discounted price. They requested an advance payment of ₹32,000 to rajeshstore@okaxis. The contact number was +91 9988776655 and further communication happened through support@useddealshop.com. After payment I never received the product.

title: PlayStation 5 Marketplace Scam
description: I attempted to purchase a PlayStation 5 through an online marketplace. The seller instructed me to transfer ₹20,000 to rajeshstore@okaxis before dispatch. The seller claimed to work for Used Deal Shop and used phone number +91 9988776655. The product was never shipped.

title: Used Bike Online Fraud
description: A seller advertised a used motorcycle at a very attractive price. They asked for ₹15,000 as a booking amount through rajeshstore@okaxis. The seller contacted me using +91 9988776655 and later became unreachable.

title: Camera Purchase Scam
description: I contacted Used Deal Shop regarding a DSLR camera. They requested ₹25,500 through UPI ID rajeshstore@okaxis. The communication happened using support@useddealshop.com and phone number +91 9988776655. After receiving payment they disappeared.

title: Drone Marketplace Fraud
description: An online seller advertised a camera drone at half the market price. They instructed me to send ₹27,000 to rajeshstore@okaxis. The seller claimed to belong to Used Deal Shop and contacted me from +91 9988776655.

title: Furniture Advance Payment Scam
description: I tried buying a sofa set from Used Deal Shop through an online marketplace. I transferred ₹11,000 to rajeshstore@okaxis after speaking with the seller on +91 9988776655. The seller blocked my number after payment.

title: Laptop Marketplace Fraud
description: A marketplace listing offered a gaming laptop at a discounted price. The seller requested ₹29,000 as an advance payment to rajeshstore@okaxis. The seller identified themselves as Used Deal Shop and provided support@useddealshop.com for communication. After payment the listing was removed.
